'''âg-m-p''' ('''gamapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neeze|neeze]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-m-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neeze|neeze]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-m-p
|-
! Lemma
| gamapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gamapithi|gamapithi]] || [[word:gamapiji|gamapiji]] || [[word:gamapishi|gamapishi]] || [[word:gamapi|gamapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamaputhuth|gamaputhuth]] || [[word:gamapujuj|gamapujuj]] || [[word:gamapushush|gamapushush]] || [[word:gamap|gamap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamaputhu|gamaputhu]] || [[word:gamapuju|gamapuju]] || [[word:gamapushu|gamapushu]] || [[word:gamapu|gamapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamapufuth|gamapufuth]] || [[word:gamapufuj|gamapufuj]] || [[word:gamapufush|gamapufush]] || [[word:gamapuf|gamapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gamapethe|gamapethe]] || [[word:gamapeje|gamapeje]] || [[word:gamapeshe|gamapeshe]] || [[word:gamape|gamape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamapothoth|gamapothoth]] || [[word:gamapojoj|gamapojoj]] || [[word:gamaposhosh|gamaposhosh]] || [[word:gamap|gamap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamapotho|gamapotho]] || [[word:gamapojo|gamapojo]] || [[word:gamaposho|gamaposho]] || [[word:gamapo|gamapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamapofoth|gamapofoth]] || [[word:gamapofoj|gamapofoj]] || [[word:gamapofosh|gamapofosh]] || [[word:gamapof|gamapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gamapĂŠthĂŠ|gamapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:gamapĂŠjĂŠ|gamapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:gamapĂŠshĂŠ|gamapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:gamapĂŠ|gamapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gamapathath|gamapathath]] || [[word:gamapajaj|gamapajaj]] || [[word:gamapashash|gamapashash]] || [[word:gamap|gamap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gamapatha|gamapatha]] || [[word:gamapaja|gamapaja]] || [[word:gamapasha|gamapasha]] || [[word:gamapa|gamapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gamapafath|gamapafath]] || [[word:gamapafaj|gamapafaj]] || [[word:gamapafash|gamapafash]] || [[word:gamapaf|gamapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gamapasha|gamapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogamapasha|gogamapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigamapasha|gokigamapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gamapnĂŒsha|gamapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogamapnknĂŒsha|gogamapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigamapnĂŒsha|gokigamapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gamapshĂ«sha|gamapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogamapnkshĂ«sha|gogamapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigamapshĂ«sha|gokigamapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamaprosha|gamaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamapnkrosha|gogamapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamaprosha|gokigamaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gamapmusha|gamapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamapnkmusha|gogamapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamapmusha|gokigamapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gamapsherasha|gamapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogamapnksherasha|gogamapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigamapsherasha|gokigamapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gamapngasha|gamapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogamapnkngasha|gogamapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigamapngasha|gokigamapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gamapyasha|gamapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogamapnkyasha|gogamapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigamapyasha|gokigamapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gamapyamasha|gamapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogamapnkyamasha|gogamapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigamapyamasha|gokigamapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gamapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gamapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gogamapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigamapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokigamapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamapnĂŒrosha|gamapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamapnknĂŒrosha|gogamapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamapnĂŒrosha|gokigamapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamapnĂŒmusha|gamapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamapnknĂŒmusha|gogamapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamapnĂŒmusha|gokigamapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gamapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gogamapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokigamapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamapshĂ«rosha|gamapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamapnkshĂ«rosha|gogamapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamapshĂ«rosha|gokigamapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamapshĂ«musha|gamapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamapnkshĂ«musha|gogamapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamapshĂ«musha|gokigamapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamapronĂŒsha|gamapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamapnkronĂŒsha|gogamapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamapronĂŒsha|gokigamapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gamaproshĂ«sha|gamaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamapnkroshĂ«sha|gogamapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigamaproshĂ«sha|gokigamaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gamapromusha|gamapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogamapnkromusha|gogamapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigamapromusha|gokigamapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gamapmunĂŒsha|gamapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogamapnkmunĂŒsha|gogamapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigamapmunĂŒsha|gokigamapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gamapmushĂ«sha|gamapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogamapnkmushĂ«sha|gogamapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigamapmushĂ«sha|gokigamapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gamapmurosha|gamapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogamapnkmurosha|gogamapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigamapmurosha|gokigamapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gamap|gamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:gĂŠmĂŠp|gĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogamap|hogamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hogĂŠmĂŠp|hogĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogamap|hohogamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogĂŠmĂŠp|hohogĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒgamap|nĂŒgamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒgĂŠmĂŠp|nĂŒgĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgamap|nĂŒnĂŒgamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠmĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒgĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻgamap|nĂŻgamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻgĂŠmĂŠp|nĂŻgĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgamap|nĂŻnĂŻgamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠmĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻgĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugamap|lugamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lugĂŠmĂŠp|lugĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugamap|lulugamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugĂŠmĂŠp|lulugĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligamap|ligamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ligĂŠmĂŠp|ligĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligamap|liligamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligĂŠmĂŠp|liligĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogamap|kogamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kogĂŠmĂŠp|kogĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogamap|kokogamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogĂŠmĂŠp|kokogĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegamap|kegamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kegĂŠmĂŠp|kegĂŠmĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegamap|kekegamap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegĂŠmĂŠp|kekegĂŠmĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
